title: PRSU Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: PRSU Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Pt. Ravishankar Shukla University Result 2026 released for BBA (Old) Sem 5, MSc Mathematics (Old and New) Sem 1 and Sem 3, MA Public Administration Sem 1, M.Ed (ATKT) Sem 4, B.Voc RETM Sem 3, CBS Integrated Sem 9 and Sem 2 (ATKT), B.Pharmacy Sem 3 and Sem 4 (ATKT) and BA (NEP) Sem 1 for Dec-Jan 2025-2026 exams on the official website - prsu.ac.in on 27-03-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the PRSU result.

content.text: Pt. Ravishankar Shukla University, Raipur has declared the PRSU Result 2026 for a wide range of UG and PG semester examinations conducted in the Dec-Jan 2025-2026 session. The latest consolidated notification covers BBA (Old) Sem 5, MSc Mathematics (Old) Sem 1 and Sem 3, MSc Mathematics Sem 3, MA Public Administration Sem 1, M.Ed (ATKT) Sem 4, B.Voc RETM Sem 3, CBS Integrated Sem 9, CBS Integrated (ATKT) Sem 2, B.Pharmacy Sem 3, B.Pharmacy (ATKT) Sem 4 and BA (NEP) Sem 1. PRSU Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - prsu.ac.in - in the form of a PDF result notification for the Dec-Jan 2025-2026 examinations.

Students can check their semester result by opening the official result PDF, searching their roll number and, where enabled, using the dedicated online student portal to download detailed marksheets with roll or registration number. After verifying their name, course, semester, subject wise marks and result status, candidates should contact the university examination section or their college if there is any discrepancy or if their result is not visible in the list.

Pt. Ravishankar Shukla University has issued a semester result notification PDF that compiles outcomes for multiple old course, NEP, ATKT and regular programmes from the Dec-Jan 2025-2026 exam session. This broad release ensures that students from management, science, education, pharmacy, vocational and arts streams can access their updated academic status in a single document and then move to the online portal for individual marks if needed.

PRSU hosts detailed semester result notifications under the Examination-Result section, with the Dec-Jan 2025-2026 consolidated PDF providing course wise result data, and the student portal enabling individual mark retrieval. Use the table below for quick navigation.

links.label: PRSU Dec-Jan 2025-2026 Semester Result Notification (BBA, MSc Maths, MA Public Admin, M.Ed ATKT, B.Voc RETM, CBS Integrated, B.Pharmacy, BA NEP)
PRSU Examination - More Results (All Latest Semester Notifications)
PRSU Online Student Result Portal (Roll No. Wise Marksheets)

content.text: Follow these steps to check and download your PRSU Dec-Jan 2025-2026 Semester Result 2026:

items: Open the official result PDF: https://www.prsu.ac.in/admin/theme/examination_uploads/27032026063146.pdf. [user data]

Once the PDF loads, press Ctrl+F and type your Roll Number to search for your entry under the respective course and semester heading (for example, BBA (Old) Sem 5, MSc Mathematics Sem 3, BA NEP Sem 1 etc.).
Note your result status (Pass/Fail/ATKT) and any other remarks mentioned alongside your roll number.
For detailed marks (if available online), visit the student result portal: https://exam.prsuuniv.in/prsuresult.
On the portal, select your Exam Type / Course / Semester as per your programme and enter your Roll Number / Registration Number.
Click on Submit / View Result to see your subject wise marks and download or print your marksheet for personal records, revaluation applications and higher education processes.
